SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-12-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-06-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. DEFTS FAILED TO APPEAR. POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $4813.63. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE. FIRST PAYMENT OF $1063.63
TO BE MADE ON 4/11/05. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $750 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON 5/1/ 05 & ON THE 1ST DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER
UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-06-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-06-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. LAST PAYMENT DUE. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHINATOWN RESTAURANT QUAN, TOHA NO APPEARANCES. CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
